name: Sarakki Lake Run
description:
BeAthlit Lake Run – Sarakki Edition 
Now Moving to Bangalore South | March 29th, 2026
BeAthlit Lake Run
 is a non-competitive community run that celebrates movement, nature, and togetherness—one lake at a time. With the Sarakki Lake Run, we’re excited to take this movement to Bangalore South, continuing our mission of reclaiming the city’s lakes as vibrant spaces for health and joy.
This edition is in collaboration with 
ODUBA RUN Club
 and will be hosted at one of South Bengaluru’s most cherished green spaces — Sarakki Lake — on March 29th, 2026.
Whether you’re a first-time runner, a casual walker, or a seasoned jogger, this is your space.
No timing chips.
No pressure.
No podium.
Just a supportive community that moves together.
Run in Celebration of Women
This International Women’s Day, we celebrate strength, resilience, and freedom of movement.
We run to honour women who show up for themselves, their families, and their communities—every single day.
Come run for yourself, with your friends, with your daughters, mothers, and sisters.
Why Bangalore South?
Bangalore South is home to some of the city’s most active neighborhoods and community-driven wellness initiatives. By bringing the Lake Run to Sarakki Lake, we aim to:
Build stronger local running and walking communities
Encourage everyday movement close to home
Celebrate and activate one of South Bengaluru’s important public green spaces
Why Join Us?
Move your body and clear your mind
Run with a community that cheers, not competes
Start your Sunday with sunrise, smiles, and sweat
Reclaim our lakes as vibrant public spaces for health and joy
Event Highlights
Friendly 3K & 5K routes around scenic Sarakki Lake
Open to all ages and fitness levels
Guided warm-up & cool-down stretches by community trainers
Refreshments & water stations
Hosted in collaboration with 
ODUBA Club
Run 10 Lake Runs and earn the title: Legend of the Lakes
Awards
Top 3 runners with the best costumes will be awarded
Creativity, spirit, and fun matter — come dressed to impress!
Venue Details
Sarakki Lake
, Bengaluru (Bangalore South)
Date: March 29th, 2026
Race Categories:
3K – Non-timed
5K – Non-timed
Participant Perks
Exclusive Finisher Medal
On-ground event photos & videos
Hydration points every 700 Mtrs
Event T-shirt
Snack Box
Event Requirements
Open to all participants
Registration fees are non-refundable
Participants must comply with all city, state, and public health regulations
Familiarity with and adherence to event rules is mandatory
More Than a Run — It’s a Movement
From North to South, lake by lake,
we’re building a healthier, more active Bengaluru.
Take control. Be intentional.
Join us in Bangalore South and be part of something bigger.
Registrations are now open
Sign up and run with purpose.

address.streetAddress: Sarakki Lake, 11th Cross, K.R Layout, Puttenahalli Rd, JP Nagar 6th Phase, MG Layout, JP Nagar Phase 6, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078, India

name: Cubbon Park to CBD, Run and Rave
description:
We don’t just show up and run, we build the experience from the start.
We begin at 
Cubbon Park (Press Club Gate)
 with easy 
pre-run interactions
, giving everyone a chance to meet, connect, and settle into the vibe. This is followed by a short 
guided warm-up
 to get the body ready.
The run includes 
2.5 / 5 / 7.5 km options
, so you can choose your distance and move at your own pace while still being part of the group. Along the route, we keep the energy up with 
optional challenges
 designed to make the run more engaging.
Post-run, we come together for a 
cool down and stretch
, helping you reset and recover. From there, we head to 
Church Street (CBD)
, where the experience continues with 
healthy drinks and clean snacks
 in a relaxed, high-energy setting.
It’s not just about finishing the run, it’s about 
staying back, connecting, and enjoying the morning with the community
.

address.streetAddress: Cubbon Park, XHJW+36F, behind India Post - Bengaluru General Post Office, Ambedkar Veedhi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001, India

name: Climb Experience at Equilibrium, Hoodi with PaceX
description:
Not your usual workout. 
⚡️
We’re taking things 
vertical
.
Join 
60 people for a high-energy community
 event at
 Equilibrium Climbing Station, Hoodi,
 combining climbing, strength, and movement-based challenges. 
Expect an electric atmosphere, new experiences, and curated brand integrations to elevate it all.
Climb. Challenge yourself. Show up.

address.streetAddress: main Rd, 415, 10th Cross Rd, Thigalarapalya, Hoodi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560048, India

name: Stick to Safety-Fitness Festival
description:
Run for a cause. Run for Safety. Run for Smarter Tomorrow. Celebrate with a vibe.
The Stick to Safety Marathon is not just a race—it’s a movement promoting safer streets, stronger communities, and conscious living. Whether you’re a seasoned runner or just stepping in for the experience, this event welcomes everyone to be part of something meaningful.
Choose your challenge from multiple categories and be part of a high-energy run that blends fitness with purpose.
And just when you think the adrenaline can’t get higher—get ready for an electrifying live performance by All Ok, bringing his signature Kannada rap and infectious energy to the stage.
From powerful strides on the track to powerful beats on stage, this event is where endurance meets entertainment.
Event Highlights:
• 3K / 5K / 10K / 10K run categories
• Entry to Live performance by All Ok
• Celebrity appearances & community leaders
• Safety awareness initiatives
• Safety Expo
• Medals, goodies & unforgettable moments
Come for the run. Stay for the experience.
Stick to Safety. Run with Purpose. Celebrate the Journey.

address.streetAddress: South United Football Club, RBANM’s Ground, No. 3, Gate, Gangadhar Chetty Rd, near Ulsoor, Rukmani Colony, Lake, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560042, India

name: Walkathon - Step Forward, Give Back
description:
Event Information
O9 and 93.5 RED FM presents Walkathon. Participants can sign up among 3 different categories: 3KM|5KM|10KM
Event is taking place at St Josephs Indian Institutions, Opp Kanteerava Stadium
10% of all registrations will be donated to the non-profit Make a Difference (MAD) to support children in need of care & protection
Each participant will be given the following:
1. Timed bib
2. T-shirt
3. Pre walkathon warm up -Zumba activity
4. E-certificate
5. Packed healthy bites
6. Medal
09 Solution: A futuristic organisation with a mission to be the most value-creating enterprise that provides sustainable energy, always look forward to create some energetic/exciting experiences for the people of the city
Red FM: as a leading Media Organisation has always curated some of the most wonderful events the city has ever seen. Also, RED FM, in its popularly known Bajaate Raho style, has contributed towards the causes that matter the most for the city.
Hence, 09 & RED FM are coming together to gift Bangaloreans a memorable and eventful experience through this WALKTHON

address.streetAddress: St Joseph Indian High School, D' Souza Layout, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001, India

name: IDOVENT MARATHON UTSAVA
description:
Marathon Utsava – returns with its 2nd Edition, continuing the spirit of fitness, endurance, and community running. After the success of the first edition at Bengaluru, this edition offers runners a well-organized and rewarding race-day experience.
Open to beginners and experienced runners alike, Marathon Utsava is designed to inspire participation, consistency, and celebration through running.
RACE CATEGORIES
5 KM – Fitness Run
• Open category
• Age limit: 18 years & above
10 KM – Timed Run
• Competitive category
• Age limit: 18 years & above
PARTICIPANT INCLUSIONS
• Official Event T-Shirt
• Bib Number
• Goodie Bag
• Finisher Medal
• E-Certificate
• Refreshment 
• Professional Event Photos
WHO CAN PARTICIPATE
Open to all fitness enthusiasts who meet the age criteria.

address.streetAddress: Survey No 78/10, A2, Bellary Rd, Chikkajala, Bengaluru, Karnataka 562157, India

name: Wesness Women's 5k Fun Run, Bengaluru 2026
description:
Wesness Women's 5K Run – Bengaluru
Something special is coming — and you're already a part of it.
The Wesness Women's 5K Run is more than a race. It's a morning of movement, shared energy, and the quiet power of women showing up — for themselves, and for each other. We can't wait to run this one with you.
——
BIB Collection Expo
Before race day, come find us at the BIB Collection Expo. Pick up your BIB, meet your fellow runners, and let the pre-run excitement wash over you. We'd love to see you there.
Venue 1
Westside Stores, Koramangala
📍 
https://share.google/xfC007PPFEMmdwXBj
Friday, 29 May & Saturday, 30 May 2026 | 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Venue 2
Westside Stores, Commercial Street
📍 
https://share.google/zCHA5kyxLq8QcWCtj
Friday, 29 May & Saturday, 30 May 2026 | 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Walk in anytime. Your BIB will be waiting.
Please note — race BIBs will only be distributed at the expo and not on race day.
——
Race Day
Venue: RBANM's Ground
📍
https://share.google/q5PJl7jgZIRB4eXZ5
Date: Sunday, 31 May 2026
How the morning unfolds —
5:40 AM — Gates Open
Come early, soak it all in.
6:00 – 6:25 AM — Zumba Warm-Up
We're kicking things off with a high-energy Zumba session. Move your body, shake off the nerves, and get ready.
6:25 AM — Runner Line-Up & Assembly
Head to the start line. You're about to do something great.
6:40 AM — 5K Run Flag-Off
This is your moment. Go.
6:50 AM — Start Line Closes
Please ensure you're at the start line before 6:50 AM. Participants will not be permitted to begin the run after this time.
7:40 – 8:00 AM — Cool Down Session
Stretch it out. You've earned it.
8:00 AM — DJ Set Begins
Because every finish line deserves a celebration.
10:00 AM — Event Close
——
A Few Things to Keep in Mind
* No BIB, No Entry. Your race BIB is required for venue access and the race route — please don't forget it.
* BIBs will not be distributed on race day. Collect yours at the expo on 29 or 30 May.
* Spectators and family members without a race BIB will not be permitted inside the venue.
* One BIB = one registered participant. Please do not exchange or share BIBs.
* There is no dedicated parking at the venue. We encourage you to use public transport or a ride service.
* Please ensure your personal medical insurance is valid prior to race day. The event does not provide individual medical coverage.
——
Thank you for being part of the Wesness community. This morning is yours — and we're honoured to share it with you.
See you at the start line. 💛

address.streetAddress: RBANM's Ground, St Johns Rd, Rukmani Colony, Sivanchetti Gardens, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560042, India
